title: Website Rebuilds
description: Complete site migrations from WordPress, Joomla, or legacy PHP to the flat-file JSON stack. Architecture decisions, content migration, and deployment.
about: Every rebuild is documented from first commit to live deploy. Watch the decision-making behind going from a bloated CMS to a lean, AI-ready flat-file system. No fluff, just real work.
